business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

coverages_discussed.current_limit: Each Occurrence: 1000000; General Aggregate: 2000000; Products Completed Ops: 2000000; Personal Advertising: 500000; Damage Rented Premises: 50000; Medical Expense: 10000; Deductible: 5000
coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number GL-HCHP-2025-3351. Coverage form GL 00 01 04 13. Endorsements include Additional Insured — Owners, Lessees Or Contractors — Scheduled Person Or Organization; Waiver Of Transfer Of Rights Of Recovery Against Others To Us; Designated Construction Project(s) General Aggregate Limit; Additional Insured — Owners, Lessees Or Contractors — Completed Operations; Exclusion — Designated Operations/Premises.

document_info.document_type: Commercial General Liability Coverage Form / Common Policy Declarations

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: SIC Code: 7011 | Description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

concerns: Endorsement schedule includes Exclusion — Designated Operations/Premises (CG 21 44 07 98).
Operations include integrated restaurant and event operations in addition to boutique hotel ownership and management.
positives: Commercial General Liability coverage in force for the 2025-05-01 to 2026-05-01 policy period.
Policy includes Additional Insured endorsements and Waiver Of Transfer Of Rights Of Recovery Against Others To Us.
Business description indicates operations are across Central and South Texas.
